mapper.select: SELECT USERID, USERNAME, EMAIL, UPOINT, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') REGDATE FROM TUSER ORDER BY UPOINT, USERID DESC
SELECT USERID, PASSWD, USERNAME, EMAIL, UPOINT, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE FROM TUSER WHERE USERID = #{userid}
SELECT USERID, PASSWD, USERNAME, EMAIL, UPOINT, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE FROM TUSER WHERE USERID = #{userid} AND PASSWD = #{passwd}
SELECT USERID, PASSWD, USERNAME, EMAIL, UPOINT, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE FROM TUSER WHERE USERID = #{userid}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TUSER ( USERID, PASSWD, USERNAME, EMAIL, UPOINT, REGDATE ) VALUES ( #{userid}, #{passwd}, #{username}, #{email}, 1000, sysdate )
